ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Name of the entity offering the plan (e.g., town, city) */,
  "plan_type" INTEGER /* Type of plan (e.g., retirement, police, fire) */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "volunteer" INTEGER /* Number of volunteers participating in the plan */,
  "all_grps" INTEGER /* Number of groups in the plan */,
  "gen_twn_grp" INTEGER /* Number of general town groups in the plan */,
  "police_grp" INTEGER /* Number of police groups in the plan */,
  "fire_grp" INTEGER /* Number of fire groups in the plan */,
  "non_cert_ed_grp" INTEGER /* Number of non-certified education groups in the plan */,
  "other_dscrptn" TEXT /* Other description of the plan */,
  "other_grp" INTEGER /* Other group participating in the plan */,
  "plan_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan was established */,
  "plan_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan will end or has ended */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., active, inactive, terminated) */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plan */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the entities table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plans_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., town, city, state) */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "entity_website" TEXT /* URL of the entity's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the participant belongs to */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the plan */,
  "pay_as_you_go" INTEGER /* Pay-as-you-go amount */,
  "req_emplyr_contrib" INTEGER /* Required employer contribution */,
  "emplyr_contrib_made" REAL /* Employer contribution made */,
  "contrib_percentage" REAL /* Contribution percentage */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of participant (e.g., active, retired, terminated) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant joined the plan */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant retired */,
  "beneficiary_name" TEXT /* Name of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the beneficiary to the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_participants_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the funding record belongs to */,
  "gasb5_val_date" TEXT /* GASB 5 valuation date */,
  "gasb5_pbo" REAL /* GASB 5 projected benefit obligation */,
  "gasb5_net_assets" REAL /* GASB 5 net assets */,
  "gasb27_val_date" TEXT /* GASB 27 valuation date */,
  "gasb27_aal" REAL /* GASB 27 actuarial accrued liability */,
  "gasb27_asset_value" REAL /* GASB 27 asset value */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total amount of funding */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was approved or received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_funding_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note about the plan */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., note, warning, error) */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was added */,
  "comment_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who added the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_comments_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of the export */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the export (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "exported_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who initiated the export */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "export_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_exports_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the import */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the import (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "imported_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who initiated the import */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "import_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_imports_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the demographic record belongs to */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the participants (e.g., 20-30, 31-40) */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicity */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary of the participants */,
  "average_tenure" REAL /* Average tenure of the participants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_demographics_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the performance record belongs to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was measured */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., return rate, growth rate) */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "performance_target" REAL /* Target value for the performance metric */,
  "performance_status" TEXT /* Status of the performance (e.g., met, not met, exceeded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_performance_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)
